verified.notes: No official Colorado-specific 2026 asset limits found in state sources; values from non-.gov source citing general MSP limits. Medicare Savings Programs (QMB/SLMB/QI) implicitly require Medicare eligibility (age 65+ or disabled). No phone number located.

programs.programName: Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) Waivers in Colorado

verified.notes: HCBS Waivers in Colorado encompass multiple programs (e.g., EBD, SLS, CHRP) with varying age requirements but no universal minimum age, asset limits, or income tests across all; no countable asset limits found in sources; contact local Case Management Agency (CMA) by county for application

verified.notes: Program is active as of 2026. Phone number is official DOL toll-free helpline for SCSEP.

programs.programName: Colorado Legal Services (Legal Aid for Seniors)

verified.notes: Age requirement of 60+ confirmed from official CLS website. Income eligibility based on federal poverty guidelines (125% with exceptions up to 200%) is stated but specific dollar thresholds not provided in search results. No asset limits found in available sources. Phone number 1-800-521-6968 is listed for Northwest Colorado office; main statewide intake process available via online pre-application or by calling local offices. Program is active and current as of 2025-2026 reporting.
